Off Calendar Nov-13-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Judge: Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Dana L. Tom, Esq. of Murchison & Cumming LLP (415-524-4300), counsel for defendant/moving party
No Appearance by any other party

The Court Adopts the Tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP's Motion To Seal Settlement Agreements is GRANTED. Moving party shall comply with the Record's Department requirements for sealing the exhibits containing the settlement agreement. Written order is signed and filed in open court.
